fields.label: Subtitle
fields.name: subtitle
fields.instructions: Short descriptor line shown under the product name. E.g. 'Pentadecapeptide fragment · Lyophilized · Research grade'

fields.label: Trust Badges
fields.name: trust_badges
fields.instructions: Exactly 4 short trust indicators shown below the header

fields.label: What It Is — Subtitle
fields.name: what_it_is_subtitle
fields.instructions: Heading shown inside the 'What it is' section. E.g. 'BPC-157 | Research Use Only'

fields.label: What It Is — Body
fields.name: what_it_is_body
fields.instructions: Main descriptive paragraph for the product

fields.label: Composition
fields.name: composition_body
fields.instructions: Molecular profile or composition section. Leave blank to hide this section.

fields.label: Research Applications
fields.name: research_applications
fields.instructions: Bulleted list of research use areas

fields.label: Documentation Metrics
fields.name: documentation_metrics
fields.instructions: 4-column metrics grid (e.g. Purity, Identity, Endotoxin, Lot ID)

fields.label: COA File (PDF)
fields.name: documentation_file
fields.instructions: Upload the Certificate of Analysis PDF. Leave blank if not yet available.

fields.label: COA Image (for gallery + inline preview)
fields.name: documentation_image
fields.instructions: Upload a PNG/JPG of the COA (e.g. a screenshot of the PDF). Used in the product photo gallery and inline COA preview so visitors don't have to download a PDF. Leave blank if not yet available.

fields.label: Documentation Caption
fields.name: documentation_caption
fields.instructions: Small caption shown below the documentation section

fields.label: Properties Table
fields.name: properties_table
fields.instructions: Key/value rows for the properties table (CAS number, MW, sequence, storage, etc.)

fields.label: Shipping Type
fields.name: shipping_type
fields.instructions: Controls which shipping info block is shown. Use 'ambient' for Bacteriostatic Water only.

fields.label: Related Products Override
fields.name: related_products_override
fields.instructions: Optional: manually select up to 3 related products. Leave blank to auto-select by category.
